// description: Web-workspace ESLint config. Extends Next.js's recommended config (which already wires the @typescript-eslint parser, react/next plugins, and the import plugin) and points the import resolver at this workspace's tsconfig so the '@/*' alias resolves correctly during `next lint` and `next build`.
// why-not-just-root-config: The repo root .eslintrc.js uses the typescript resolver but doesn't know which tsconfig to load — at the web workspace it should pick apps/web/tsconfig.json so the @/* paths in src/ resolve. The 'project' field below pins it explicitly.
